pricing.refundPolicy: No general refund policy. Refunds available only if KYC is refused. Optional add-ons available: 100% profit split upgrade and first reward on demand at additional cost.

payouts.schedule: Bi-weekly (14 days); first reward on demand available as upgrade; 100% profit split available via add-on

rules.consistencyRule: 15-40% depending on model. Pro and Instant accounts enforce consistency rules post-funding. Standard evaluation accounts have no consistency rule.
rules.notes: News trading allowed during evaluation; on funded accounts, opening or closing trades is not allowed within 5 minutes before or after high-impact news including FOMC statements and speeches. Weekend holding allowed; crypto markets available 24/7 including weekends. Trade copiers permitted for managing your own accounts only — cross-user or social copy trading prohibited. EAs allowed on all platforms — no tick manipulation, latency arbitrage, or HFT strategies. Hedging allowed within the same account only — cross-account hedging prohibited. Martingale strategies permitted. No forced stop losses or lot size limits. Risk per trade should stay within 1-2%, margin use should not exceed 80%. Accounts breach after 30 days with no trade placed (inactivity rule). No arbitrage or tick scalping. All accounts are demo/simulated trading environments. Payments processed by Paytiko (cards, Apple Pay, crypto). AquaFunded also operates AquaFutures (futures trading) and AquaFunded Crypto (dedicated crypto product) as separate offerings.

markets.instruments: CFD: Forex (28 pairs, up to 1:100 evaluation / 1:50 funded standard / 1:50 funded pro), Metals (2, 1:20 evaluation / 1:10 funded), Indices (7, 1:20 evaluation / 1:10 funded), Commodities (2, 1:20 evaluation / 1:10 funded), Crypto (40+, up to 1:5 leverage). AquaFutures: futures via ProjectX and Volumetrica across $25K–$150K accounts (Instant Standard, Instant Pro, One Step Beginner, One Step Standard). AquaFunded Crypto: dedicated crypto product with Instant Funding, One Step, and AquaMan models.

notableFlags: Trustpilot profile flagged for guideline breaches — fake reviews removed
Partners with ThinkMarkets and Purple Trading (undisclosed)

support.hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM Dubai time
